case_title: AVALON BAY COMMUNITIES, INC VS. NICOLE NEPOVE et al

docket_entries.description: HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT NICOLE NEPOVE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. NICOLE NEPOVE HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: D.LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)
FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF NICOLE NEPOVE ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT NEPOVE, NICOLE HEARING SET FOR APR-30-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT NEPOVE, NICOLE

MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF APR-15-2008 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON APR-15-2008 AT 9:45 AM IN DEPT. 514, THOMAS J. MELLON, JR., FOR DEFAULT PROVE UP HEARING. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: D.LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)
MINUTES FOR APR-15-2008 9:45 AM FOR DEPT 514
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO DEFENDANT NEPOVE, NICOLE AKA NICOLE NAPOVE

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT NEPOVE, NICOLE AKA NICOLE NAPOVE
REQUEST TO SET CASE FOR COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALON BAY COMMUNITIES, INC COURT TRIAL SET FOR APR-14-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR APR-14-2008 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT (CONTINUED) ON APR-15-2008 AT 9:30 AM IN 206. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT IN PROPRIA PERSONA. DEFENDANT'S HUSBAND REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT DEFENDANT IS ILL. THE COURT ORDERED THE MATTER CONTINUED TO 4/15/08 FOR DEFENDANT TO BE PRESENT WITH A DOCTOR'S LETTER OR DECLARATION. JUDGE: JULIE TANG; CLERK: DLOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, CSR #4280 (206)
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL

ORDERED ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 514 FOR COURT TRIAL/DEFAULT PROVE UP HEARING. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. WITNESS SWORN AND EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE INTRODUCED. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $4,581.00, AND RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 388 BEALE ST., APT. 511, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94105. LEASE FORFEITED. REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON APR-15-2008 IN DEPT 514. JUDGE THOMAS J. MELLON, JR., CLERK: V. MACK, REPORTER: GISELLE CASEY CSR 8098.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVALON BAY COMMUNITIES, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEPOVE, NICOLE AKA NICOLE NAPOVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 388 BEALE STREET, APT. 511, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94105 $4,301.00 RENT, $280.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,581.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
